title: What if Evangelion met Cowboy Bebop
display_title: What if Evangelion met Cowboy Bebop
wikitext:
[]: What if Evangelion met Cowboy Bebop?             Quote Post by trkk-KAAN » Wed Feb 15, 2012 10:11 pm What do u think?

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Wed Feb 15, 2012 10:16 pm . . . I've got nothin'.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Thu Feb 16, 2012 12:10 am It would end with a bang.

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Thu Feb 16, 2012 12:57 am Relevant: Alternate Eva Opening: Eva Bebop Ayanami Rei / Evangelion Bebop Art

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Thu Feb 16, 2012 1:57 am EvangelionFan wrote: Relevant: Alternate Eva Opening: Eva Bebop Ayanami Rei / Evangelion Bebop Art

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Feb 16, 2012 2:50 am It'd be the new Eva Store Seele00TextOnly wrote: I has made a discovery.

[]:             Quote Post by Radical Lanzar » Thu Feb 16, 2012 3:19 am They could very well exist in the same timeline with Eva in the past and Bebop in the future. If that were the case, then most of what goes on Earth wouldn't matter anyway - in Bebop most of the planet is in ruins.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Thu Feb 16, 2012 8:28 am It depends if he's at his computer.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Thu Feb 16, 2012 8:42 am Well, that wouldn't happen. Why? Because your grammar sucks, lol. Eva-Bebop is one of the best Fanmade things out there.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Thu Feb 16, 2012 9:05 am

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Feb 16, 2012 9:10 am child of Lilith wrote: . . . I've got nothin'.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Thu Feb 16, 2012 9:58 am The Eva Monkey wrote: It already exists. It's called Big O .

[]:             Quote Post by Final Messenger » Thu Feb 16, 2012 10:20 am I’ve never watched the big O before but from all the footage I’ve seen of it for some reason it reminds me of Batman

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Feb 16, 2012 10:29 am Final Messenger wrote: I’ve never watched the big O before but from all the footage I’ve seen of it for some reason it reminds me of Batman

[]:             Quote Post by driftking18594 » Thu Feb 16, 2012 12:06 pm Congratulations, now I'm imagining Misato cosplaying as Faye. Not that that's a bad thing.

[]:             Quote Post by trkk-KAAN » Thu Feb 16, 2012 1:13 pm Id imagine that the Eva pilots went to the future in 2071 during a fight with the angels, the angels would have used something to make the Eva pilots go in the future so they can destroy tokyo-3 and they end up in mars, still in there evas almost wreaking havoc in mars becoming mars's most wanted and the bebop gang would try to get them. And Shinji would get scared going to jail crying.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Thu Feb 16, 2012 8:00 pm driftking18594 wrote: Congratulations, now I'm imagining Misato cosplaying as Faye. Not that that's a bad thing.

[]:             Quote Post by trkk-KAAN » Thu Feb 16, 2012 8:32 pm Ugh. Now I'm imagining Asuka cosplaying as Ed (shutters) :p

[]:             Quote Post by driftking18594 » Fri Feb 17, 2012 2:08 pm ^ Could be worse...you could have Shinji as Spike. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by trkk-KAAN » Fri Feb 17, 2012 11:55 pm I can also imagine Shinji and spike sharing their past, just like in the cowboy bebop movie only they are not in jail. Not bad eh?
summary:

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Wed Feb 15, 2012 10:16 pm . . . I've got nothin'.
